prompt: Create a coherent 4x4 raster south-facing death sequence for Lee Sin, 16 ordered poses from stagger/fall through golden spirit afterimage and recovery, compact effects, cyan chroma-key background, no bomb and no runtime integration.

frames.order: frame-00..frame-15; stand, stagger, fall, prone, spirit rise, kneel recovery and return

validation.frameBorderFix: Grok removed disconnected seam bleed and shifted later poses inside the cells.
validation.atlasIssue: Both atlases diverge from their discrete frame cells after the interrupted Grok rebuild.
validation.cyanSpill: no visible cyan halo in the inspected contact sheet
validation.decision: Discarded because the interrupted worker left atlases inconsistent with frames; no further overwrite was applied.

grok.summary: Worker identified disconnected seam bleed, cleaned/shifted frames, then exited before completing a correct atlas/GIF rebuild.

origin: Internal candidate generated for the Bomba PvP animation lab; no external pack or downloaded asset.
license: Internal project source; discarded candidate; not approved for final Champion distribution.
